content:
As a measure of the long-term durability, the laminates were exposed to damp heat (DH) up to 3000 hours. [REF:2].

The main objective of this work was to assess the long-term ageing behavior of double-glass laminates based on UV-transparent 
EVA and POE u... [REF:9].

**Key Findings**

- As a measure of the long-term durability, the laminates were exposed to damp heat (DH) up to 3000 hours. [REF:2]
- The main objective of this work was to assess the long-term ageing behavior of double-glass laminates based on UV-transparent 
EVA and POE u... [REF:9]
